title: API local-only guard module (MVP: no cloud sync)

task.description: Add a lintable, explicit module that documents and enforces the MVP constraint of no network usage for habit data. This provides a clear import path for any accidental API usage to fail fast in development.
acceptance_criteria: `throwIfApiCalled()` throws an `Error` with `name === "LocalOnlyMvpError"` and message containing the passed `feature` string
No existing screens or repos are required to import this module for the app to compile

definition_of_done: Module has no side effects on import
No app behavior changes until imported elsewhere
